时政热点.title: EU should not miss an opportunity on Ukraine diplomacy: Bulgarian FM Velislava Petrova
时政热点.summary: Bulgaria has become notorious for holding elections. In 5 years, voters went to the polls 8 times. But this debilitating crisis finally ended on April 19th, when the Progressive Bulgaria party won an outright majority. It is led by the former president, Rumen Radev, now the prime minister.

国际要闻.title: Xizang's high-quality environment debunks groundless Western accusations
国际要闻.summary: Xizang boasts 97 nature reserves, covering a total area of 434,000 square kilometers, and is home to 246 wildlife species under key national protection. Notably, over 80 percent of the global Tibetan antelope, wild yak and black-necked crane populations spend winter in the region.

国际要闻.title: Long-term strategies help China's great green wall thrive
